title: ophrys arachnites var. cornuta
intro: Ophrys arachnites var. cornuta, commonly known as the Spider Orchid, is a type of orchid species that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include the treatment of various health issues such as digestive problems and inflammation due to its health benefits.
